subtitle.en: GFP chromophore (p-HBDI) forms spontaneously from three amino acids inside a rigid 11-strand β-barrel; the barrel suppresses non-radiative decay → bright 509 nm fluorescence
subtitle.ko: GFP의 p-HBDI 발색단이 3 amino acid에서 자가 형성, 11-strand β-barrel이 비방사 감쇠 억제 → 509 nm 형광

description.en: β-barrel cage with central chromophore. Toggle barrel on/off to show fluorescence on/off. Foundation of genetically encoded fluorescent tags.
description.ko: β-barrel 케이지 + 중심 발색단. 토글로 fluorescence on/off. 유전자 부호화 형광 태그 기반.
